text: Standing in this space makes me feel curious and slightly disoriented. The sharp angles and reflective surfaces distort my perception, echoing the theme of research and development displayed on the vibrant wall. Here, I sense the merging of creativity and science, and I am both intrigued by the possibilities and a little unsettled by the artificiality. It is a place of transition and experiment, and I feel the excitement of potential new understandings brewing around me.
